OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

RST_THREAT_FEED_BASEURL.description: RST Threat Feed Base URL. By default, use https://api.rstcloud.net/v1. In some cases, you may want to use a local API endpoint.

RST_THREAT_FEED_APIKEY.description: Your API Key for accessing RST Cloud.

RST_THREAT_FEED_SSL_VERIFY.description: If set to false, SSL verification is disabled (use with caution, sometimes needed when SSL inspection is enabled).

RST_THREAT_FEED_CONTIMEOUT.description: Connection timeout (seconds) to the RST Threat Feed API.

RST_THREAT_FEED_READTIMEOUT.description: Read timeout (seconds) for each feed download (API redirects to AWS S3).

RST_THREAT_FEED_RETRY.description: Number of attempts to download the feed.

RST_THREAT_FEED_INTERVAL.description: Fetch interval in seconds (how often the connector will run for the feed download).

RST_THREAT_FEED_MAX_RETRIES.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for connection issues when sending the STIX bundle to OpenCTI.

RST_THREAT_FEED_RETRY_DELAY.description: Initial delay in seconds before retrying a failed connection to OpenCTI.

RST_THREAT_FEED_RETRY_BACKOFF_MULTIPLIER.description: Multiplier applied to the retry delay for exponential backoff between retries to send data to OpenCTI.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_IMPORT.description: Import only indicators with risk score more than this value.

RST_THREAT_FEED_LATEST.description: Defines how often the latest threat feed data is fetched. Options: 1h, 4h, 12h, day.

RST_THREAT_FEED_IP.description: If true, the connector retrieves threat intelligence data for IP addresses.

RST_THREAT_FEED_DOMAIN.description: If true, the connector retrieves threat intelligence data for domains.

RST_THREAT_FEED_URL.description: If true, the connector retrieves threat intelligence data for URLs.

RST_THREAT_FEED_HASH.description: If true, the connector retrieves threat intelligence data for file hashes (MD5, SHA1, SHA256).

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_IP.description: IP indicators with risk score more than this value are marked with x_opencti_detection=true.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_DOMA.description: Domain indicators with risk score more than this value are marked with x_opencti_detection=true.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_URL.description: URL indicators with risk score more than this value are marked with x_opencti_detection=true.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_HASH.description: Hash indicators with risk score more than this value are marked with x_opencti_detection=true.

RST_THREAT_FEED_ONLY_NEW.description: If true, import only indicators with recent "First Seen" (do not re-import older indicators based on "Last Seen").

RST_THREAT_FEED_ONLY_ATTRIBUTED.description: If true, import only indicators that are attributed to known threats.

RST_THREAT_FEED_KEEP_NAMED_VULNS.description: If true, create named vulnerabilities as separate objects, otherwise prefer CVE numbers.

RST_THREAT_FEED_CREATE_CUSTOM_TTPS.description: If true, create custom attack-pattern objects for named techniques/attacks not present in MITRE ATT&CK.

RST_THREAT_FEED_CREATE_MITRE_TTPS.description: If true, create relationships: Indicator -> indicates -> Attack-Pattern (MITRE TTP). Will create many relationships, use with caution.
